title: Incription To Milton
content:
The new world honors him whose lofty plea
    For England's freedom made her own more sure,
    Whose song, immortal as its theme, shall be
    Their common freehold while both worlds endure
meaning:
This evocative piece by John Greenleaf Whittier, titled "Incription To Milton", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
